annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under S.C. Code Ann. § 34-31-20(B), currently 10.75% (as of January 15, 2026). Legal rate = (prime rate as listed in the first edition of the Wall Street Journal published for the calendar year for which damages are awarded) + 4 percentage points,… Compounded annually. This is the rate on money decrees and judgments under § 34-31-20(B), applicable to all judgments entered on or after July 1, 2005. TRANSITIONAL: for… Verify the current value at scstatehouse.gov; not legal advice.

Post-judgment interest under S.C. Code Ann. § 34-31-20(B), currently 10.75% (as of January 15, 2026). Legal rate = (prime rate as listed in the first edition of the Wall Street Journal published for the calendar year for which damages are awarded) + 4 percentage points,… Compounded annually. This is the rate on money decrees and judgments under § 34-31-20(B), applicable to all judgments entered on or after July 1, 2005.
